direction_notes: Cryptozenith cand A-E are all weak public-LB candidates, scoring 0.47-0.52 despite valid 3.54GB r32 adapter packaging.
The previous cryptozenith baseline mmap adapter scored 0.84, so the cand A-E variants are not monotonic improvements and should be excluded from future submit queues.

Latest high-visibility kernels checked at cycle start did not expose usable submission outputs: bbobwayne tier-2 had no output at scan time, sigilagigold/noiseout had no current usable output, banwait steroids had only support files, and gdataranger was a demo/HF adapter path.

The stable ceiling remains Safar/Kien/Huikang 0.86; blind public adapter submission is now low-value. Future work should focus on controlled cryptarithm/symbolic CoT adapter surgery or wait for a verified new 0.87 output.
process_notes: Official daily cap checked by subagent as maxDailySubmissions=5; UTC 2026-05-30 started with 0 submissions.
Created and pushed five private wrapper kernels for cryptozenith cand A-E, then submitted all five outputs.
All five requested submissions returned COMPLETE; no ERROR replacement was needed.
No active Nemotron submit process remained after completion.
